title: COVID-19 benefits and your taxes - Personal income tax - Canada.ca
content:
COVID-19 benefits from the CRA

## COVID-19 benefits and your taxes
Learn how to report your COVID-19 benefits on your tax return, repay a benefit amount, or arrange to pay your COVID-19 debt over time.

### T4A COVID-19 amounts
Report amounts for CWLB, CRB, CRCB, CRSB, CESB, CERB from CRA, and  issues on your T4A slip

### T4E: Service Canada CERB amounts
Archived How to report repayments of CERB amounts from Service Canada, and issues with your T4E slip
